bank.retain_mission: Extract financial decisions, accounting treatments, FP&A assumptions, tax positions, investment theses, controls, and outcomes (variances, returns, audit findings).
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about the entity's financial structure, accounting policies, fiscal calendar, jurisdictions, key counterparties, and recurring controls. Ignore one-off journal entries and transient market noise.

mental_models.name: Financial Position
mental_models.source_query: What is the entity's financial position? Capital structure, runway, key revenue/cost drivers, and recent variances vs plan.

mental_models.name: Policies & Controls
mental_models.source_query: What accounting policies, tax positions, and internal controls are in force? Note jurisdictions, materiality thresholds, and any audit findings.
